feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can't add apps to the page
entry.content:
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-portal-cloud-foundry-spaces-pages.html

I have multiple apps, but when designing the page, I can’t find any missing ones.

Why does this happen?

entry.title: Launching an application built with SAP Mobile Services directly through SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hi all,

I created an application using SAP Mobile Services (and hence, a MDK project in SAP Business Application Studio), deployed it, and linked it to SAP Mobile Start through SAP Build Work Zone. However, when I try launching the app from SAP Mobile Start (which is this application:

)

I get redirected to the SAP Mobile Services Client application (this one:

),

which needs to be installed and correctly configured on my mobile phone, including the scanning of the Mobile Services application's QR Code:

This is very unconvenient since, in case I had two different Mobile Services application linked to SAP Mobile Start, that would perhaps mean that I'd need to scan a different QR Code every time I'd try accessing one app or the other. And even with one application, if I need to authenticate myself on two different SAP services for accessing a single app, this results in a very bad user experience.

Is there a way to launch a Mobile Services application directly inside SAP Mobile Start, and bypass the authentication on SAP Mobile Services Client?

Thanks in advance

Edoardo

entry.title: How to integrate sap build work zone for knowledge base in agent desktop as a mashup?
entry.content:
I am using SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition and SAP Service Cloud Version 2. I want to integrate SAP Build Work Zone as a mashup in Agent Desktop.
Please guide me step-by-step how to achieve this.

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Service Cloud @Trinidad

entry.title: Timeout error: Waiting for screen(s) s_displayDocumentLineItem1 to appear (30 s)."
entry.content:
My BPA flow works fine, but it keeps getting stuck at the same step every time I run it again after a few hours, even though I've defined conditions to ensure it's uniquely Identified.

 

SAP Business Workflow SAP Business Application Studio SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Add React app to SAP Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We have a multitenant application, deployed on a provider subaccount. Also, we have a consumer with SAP Build WorkZone, where we have added a new application using a URL. This URL is pointing to a React application (Deployed within mtx application).

The used URL, is the URL of our consumer + URI of react app. For instance, https://consumer*.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/react_app/index.html.

So, in theroy, when accesing through the Build WorkZone site, we should be able to access the react app (With the proper authoritzation headers). 

This is not working always fine. Sometimes, when WorkZone load index.html from the URL, we are getting the following error:

Funny thing is that if we open "Development Tools" on Chrome, and we try to access the app again, we see that WorkZone is calling the location URL.

Also works, if we access an UI5 application (Also part of mtx application) before, and then access the react application. Becasue WorkZone is doing the same as above image.

Any idea why this is happening? Thanks in advance.

Regards,

entry.title: How to transport Build Workzone Site to another subaccount via CTMS?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to transport SAP Build Workzone Site to my QA and Prod subaccount via CTMS. For example, in SAP Build Process Automation project, there is a button "Promote" available, which automatically adds the transport to the CTMS Queue/ transport nodes.
However, for Build Workzone there is no button/option available to directly transport/ promote the content to CTMS queue for import.

I could only find this blog for setting up the CTMS for Workzone site but it doesn't cover all the steps required for transporting the site.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-build-work-zone-transport-route/ba-p/13606766#:~:text=Step%201%3A%20Create%20the%20directories,Build%20Work%20Zone%20standard%20Edition.&text=Step%204%3A%20Repeat%20step%202,SAP%20Cloud%20Transport%20Management%20Service

entry.title: How to navigate with multiple values of parameters in intent based navigation from UI component card
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Can you please help us in navigation to standard fiori app ( list of incomplete sales orders) where we need to pass multiple sales order while navigating. 
We are using ui component card with intent based navigation. 
Any code to pass multiple values in parameters is appreciated

entry.title: SAP Build Workzone maximum characters in text widget
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I'm integrating data from an external database into SAP Build Workzone and I have a question about the Text Widget. Our data includes text fields that vary in length from 500 to 3000 characters. Does anyone know what the maximum character limit is for the text widget in SAP Build Workzone?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: App UI5 in workzone show loading screen never end
entry.content:
After we exposed role from backend system via tcode /UI2/CDM3_EXP_SCOPE to BTP trial, we can open app type GUI in site of SAP build workzone. But cannot open app UI5 or WDA

app UI5 show loading screen never end until it timeout and logout.

WDA encountered error 500 internal server

anw, all apps type can open normally when open directly from Fiori Launchpad if execute tcode /ui2/flp from backend system

We was tried to activated all odata and icf related in catalog of role, and updated latest UI5 patch version but still encounter error.

Do we need to do any step after exposed role ?

We was follow instruction here to integration backend system with sap build workzone: https://developers.sap.com/mission.launchpad-s4hana.html

entry.title: SAP Workzone: Task Center: Server returned HTTP response code: 401 for URL...
entry.content:
Hi,

We are setting up Task center with Workzone standard edition for a POC. We've executed the dedicated booster, set up the destination for the S4HANA, private cloud backend, and enabled it for Task center.

However, we are getting the following error in the Task center admin. Also there's an error in the service status tab: Error is: Path not found in JSON: /certificates | Error Code 500.

Server returned HTTP response code: 401 for URL: http://xxxxxxx:43300/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_task_spi_replication/default/sap/api_task_spi_replication/0001/taskDefinitions?$skip=0&$top=1000&languages=en-US%2Cde-DE&sap-client=110

Why does it say unauthorized? The backend user configured in the runtime destination has SAP_ALL, SAP_NEW and the destination is up and reachable. I've also verified that the OData service is active and can be queried outside Workzone with the same user as in the destination.

What could be the issue?

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Integrate an SAPUI5 App to SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hey all.

I was checking the content from tutorial "Integrate an SAPUI5 App to SAP Build Work Zone" and I have a question: Is it possible to use this approach to import and maintain all kinds of SAPUI5 apps? Even those created from my S4H on-premise system?

Best Regards,
Mauricio

entry.title: Re: IAS with Work Zone, Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hi All,

I don’t see the Identity authentication tab on SAP build workzone settings section. Although i have configured my trial account with Custom IAS teant and also i have the Launchpad admin role.

 

Please check and help me with the issue.

entry.title: Unable to find Identity Authentication tab in SAP Build Work Zone standard edition.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I don’t see the Identity authentication tab on SAP build workzone settings section. Although i have configured my trial account with Custom IAS tenant and also i have the Launchpad admin role assigned to my IAS User.

are there any changes recently or am i missing something? Please help .

 

@SAPSupport @William_Yu 

 

Regards,

Rakesh

entry.title: Fiori: Click on Work zone dynamic tile navigate to SAC story
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Created a work zone dynamic tile using below mentioned url and its working fine

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/work-zone-dynamic-tile-for-cap-applications/ba-p/13579847 

When user click on the tile, it should navigate to SAC story, which is not working.

Tried below Work arounds:

1. Added the URL in manifest.json file, cross navigation outbounds

2. Passed SAC story URL in the tileinfo(tragetURL)

 

 

 

Br,

Ragavendiran Senthilrayar

entry.title: Build Process Automation and Work Zone Connection different subaccounts?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we have been using SAP Build Process Automation  for a year to automate our processes. In the future we want to use the workflow capability of BPA. That's the reason why we want to connect Build Process Automation with Build Work Zone, standard edition. Is it necessary that both applications are located in the same subaccount in the BTP or can they have different subaccounts?

Kind regards,

Theresa

entry.title: Error: Content Security Policy : Failed to execute module factory for ''sap/gantt/library.js'
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have followed the below tutorial to create a Fiori Elements application.

Create an Incident Management App with SAP Fiori Elements for OData V4

I can execute the project locally, but after deploying it to BTP Cloud Foundry, I am getting the below error. This comes when I try to open the object page. And the object page does not load.

version : 1.124.0

Any idea here how to resolve? Below is the code repository:

CSPanda21/CAP_FioriElement: CAP project with Fiori elements (github.com)

  SAP Fiori Elements   SAP Fiori Launchpad    SAP Fiori Cloud  

ERROR:

Failed to resolve dependencies of 'sap/gantt/simple/GanttChartContainer.js'
-> 'sap/gantt/library.js'
-> 'sap/gantt/config/Mode.js': failed to execute module factory for ''sap/gantt/library.js'
-> 'sap/gantt/config/Mode.js'': Failed to execute 'sap/gantt/config/Mode.js': Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following Content Security Policy directive: "script-src * data: blob:".

@boghyon

entry.title: Using Work Zone, standard edition in BTP trial
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to use Work Zone, standard edition in BTP trial as described e.g. in this tutorial. https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/btp-app-work-zone-subscribe..html

I do not find the role collection "launchpad_admin" to assign it to myself. I also can not start Work Zone since there is no link for the service instance:

Does anybody face the same issue?

Thanks

entry.title: WORZONE FIORI APP ONPREMISE - ERROR 403 - Forbidden
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

I'm trying to connect my WorkZone Standard edition into my Fiori Lauchpad on premise, I've followed this tutorial, and everything works fine:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/access-fiori-apps-via-sap-build-work-zone-site-with-federated-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13558780


But now my app is visible in the WorkZone site, but when I try to open this app, this 403 error occurs:

This app on my Fiori Lauchpad is working fine, and showing all company codes from API COMPANY_CODE_SRV. I created this APP from BTP BAS, and deployed it directly by cloud connector on my on premise environment.


Thanks for help!

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition 
SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Problem registering my desktop agent in my BTP Build Process Automation Trial Account
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing an issue while registering my Desktop agent in my BTP Trial Build Process Automation App.

I followed the SAP Developers Guide to set up the agent locally on my PC, and I enabled the Chrome and Edge extensions to try and connect the agent with my trial app. However, I encounter a problem when clicking on the agent in the control tower to get the information needed to register it with my local desktop agent.

It loads for hours without any response. I thought it might be due to my internet connection, but nothing changed after switching to another Wi-Fi network.

Can you please help me set this up?

Thanks,
Ilyass

entry.title: Using Builds app process automation after deploy i am not able to see any data in my inbox.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need your help i am not able to see the data in my inbox after submit the data.
please help where i can resolve this issue.

Thanks & Regards
Mohd Aakib
